description: Combine STAR --quantMode GeneCounts *.ReadsPerGene.out.tab files into a gene x sample integer counts matrix, selecting the column for the chosen strandedness (unstranded=1, forward=2, reverse=3) and skipping STAR's first 4 summary rows. Writes counts.csv (genes x samples) and metadata_template.csv.
rules: local analysis — reads *.ReadsPerGene.out.tab, writes counts.csv + metadata_template.csv under record_store
strandedness selects the count column; the wrong choice silently halves counts — default 'reverse'
counts are already integers; all-zero genes are dropped
needs only python3 + pandas — no aligner or science container required
usage: Set QUANT_DIR (dir of *.ReadsPerGene.out.tab). Optionally set STRANDEDNESS (unstranded|forward|reverse, default reverse). Output: counts/counts.csv + counts/metadata_template.csv.
limitation: STAR GeneCounts mode only. Strandedness must match the library prep; this perk does not infer it.
